name: generate_backlog
description: Generate a structured Agile backlog of Epics, Stories, and Subtasks from a project description. Each issue includes a title, description, parent reference, and type.

issues.description: Ordered list of Agile work items forming the project backlog.

title.description: Short, descriptive title for the work item.

description.description: Agile-compliant description (50 words max). Epics describe business value, Stories describe user-facing behavior, Subtasks describe implementation steps.

parent.description: Title of the parent work item. Null for Epics.
